content:
# Enterprise - OpenCode for Organizations

## Trial

Enterprise trials are available. Contact the OpenCode team for evaluation access.

## Data Handling

- **No code storage**: OpenCode does not store your code. Only session data and configurations are stored.
- **Code ownership**: You retain full ownership of all your code. OpenCode never claims any rights to your code.

## Pricing

Per-seat pricing model. Contact sales for specific pricing tiers and volume discounts.

## Deployment

- **Central config**: Deploy centralized configuration across your organization
- **SSO integration**: Single Sign-On support for team authentication
- **Internal AI gateway**: Route AI requests through your own internal gateway
- **Self-hosting roadmap**: Self-hosting capabilities are on the roadmap

## FAQ

- **Data privacy**: Your code never leaves your environment unless you explicitly share a session
- **Security**: Enterprise-grade security with permission controls and audit logging
- **Support**: Dedicated enterprise support included
